title: Emergency renewal sweep — Cobalt (lapsed) + Atlas (13d)
description: Pipeline went 26 days without a sweep. Data files and action-item tracker are now refreshed in renewals/. Two Critical accounts need plans this week: Cobalt Partners ($62K) renewal LAPSED Jun 15 with notice deadline also lapsed — reassess and decide save vs. wind-down, and get Sales to confirm contract status; Atlas Logistics ($210K) renews Jul 1 (13d) with open P1, competitor Northwind named, exec sponsor cold ~64d — reassess and write the action plan. Then refresh board/index.html (still shows 1 Critical ≤30d; it's now 2). See renewals/escalations/2026-06-18-*.md and the new <account>-data.md files.
